note: T2.5 archive pins (sha256) of the primary RBI regulation PDFs. Generated by scripts/pin_regulations.py.

entries.note: The earlier download was the notification's COVERING LETTER only (RBI/2023-24/69, DOR.AML.REC.44, 1 page) - it references the amendment table but does not contain it, so it was removed. RBI publishes this notification as two separate PDFs; the amendment table (beneficial-owner threshold 15% -> 10% for partnership firms) is in the SEPARATE annexure: https://rbidocs.rbi.org.in/rdocs/content/pdfs/MDKYC17102023_Annexure.pdf . Download that annexure by hand (CAPTCHA-walled to scripts - verified 2026-07-10), save it here as kyc-amend-2023-10-17.pdf, then re-run scripts/pin_regulations.py. Fallback if the annexure is unobtainable: pin any pre-Oct-2023 consolidation of the 2016 KYC MD that shows the 15% figure, and set doc_role/note accordingly. P4's NEW side (10%) is already covered by kyc-md-2016-final-consol.pdf.
